sentences.arabic: كَانَ عُمَرُ يَبْتَسِمُ دَائِمًا حِينَ يَلْتَقِي النَّاسَ.
sentences.translation: Omer je uvijek nasmiješen kad sreće ljude.
sentences.translationEn: Omar always smiled when he met people.

sentences.arabic: يَعْلَمُ أَنَّ الِابْتِسَامَةَ صَدَقَةٌ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translation: Zna da je osmijeh sadaka u islamu.
sentences.translationEn: He knows that smiling is charity in Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لِصَدِيقِهِ: الِابْتِسَامَةُ لَا تُكَلِّفُ شَيْئًا وَلَكِنَّهَا تُسْعِدُ النَّاسَ.
sentences.translation: Rekao je prijatelju: Osmijeh ništa ne košta ali čini ljude sretnim.
sentences.translationEn: He told his friend: A smile costs nothing but makes people happy.

sentences.translation: Prijatelj se složio i on se nasmiješio.
sentences.translationEn: His friend agreed and smiled too.
